newsSinceJun6: No material fundamental news since June 6. The dominant recent event is the $115M follow-on offering (5.17M shares at $22.25, ~7% dilution) that closed June 5; today's -5.11% to $21.91 takes the stock below the offering price and looks like flow-driven post-deal digestion, not a thesis event. Use of proceeds explicitly cites accelerating commercial interest in AI infrastructure / co-packaged optics alongside existing lidar applications, so the raise strengthens the balance sheet for commercialization. Only incremental item since June 6 is a non-material marketing showcase of Aeva CityOS at ITS America in Detroit, June 9-12.

sources.label: Aeva announces closing of $115M follow-on offering (Yahoo Finance / Business Wire)
Aeva prices follow-on offering at $22.25 (Business Wire)
Aeva prices $100M offering; shares fall 12% after hours (MSN)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already marked AEVA down for the +~72% YTD rerating and crowding; today's -5.11% is flow-driven offering digestion with the physical-AI sensing thesis intact, which modestly restores asymmetry but is not new fundamental information warranting another move one day later.
verdicts.bull: The $115M raise extends runway and explicitly funds the AI-infrastructure/co-packaged-optics expansion on top of automotive and industrial lidar wins; buying below the $22.25 deal price gets you in behind the institutional book.
verdicts.neutral: Record Q1 revenue of $6.3M (+90% YoY) is still tiny against a $1.4B cap and a $25.8M quarterly operating loss; the stock remains a story name where dilution events set the near-term price, not fundamentals.
verdicts.bear: At +72% YTD the rerating already happened, the fresh ~7% dilution caps upside, and if the deal-price floor at $22.25 fails to hold, post-offering supply could grind the stock lower with no near-term catalyst until the next commercial design win.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New commercial design wins or CPO/AI-infrastructure customer announcements funded by the fresh $115M, plus continued 90%+ revenue growth in Q2 results.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-offering supply overhang and crowding unwind in a richly rerated, pre-scale ($6.3M/quarter revenue) story stock.
